productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Printed Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline, short sleeves, stitch detailing and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This stylish T-shirt from status quo makes you look chic with ease. The stitch detailing adds a fashionable touch and, as it's crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos.
